mapper.select: SELECT * FROM adoption_contract WHERE trial_end_date IS NOT NULL AND trial_end_date BETWEEN CURDATE() AND DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) ORDER BY trial_end_date ASC
SELECT * FROM adoption_contract WHERE trial_end_date IS NOT NULL AND trial_end_date < CURDATE() ORDER BY trial_end_date DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM adoption_contract WHERE sign_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}
